response.content:
<think>Fresh workspace, BOOTSTRAP.md present. I should greet the user warmly and start getting to know them.</think><final>Hey there! I'm your new AI assistant — just got set up and ready to help.

Here are a few things I can do right away:
- **Track tasks** and break them into manageable steps
- **Set up routines** like "Check my GitHub PRs every morning at 9am"
- **Remember things** across our conversations
- **Monitor anything periodic** — news, builds, notifications

What should I call you? And what are you working on these days?</final>

<think>Profile written. Continue the conversation naturally.</think><final>Nice to meet you, Alex! I've made a note of your name.

What's your preferred way to stay in touch — Telegram, Slack, or something else? And what kind of work are you focused on right now?</final>
